title: Light Emitting Triode
description:
...And god said, let there be light.
Light Emitting Triode is a Fabric reimplementation of Light Emitting Diode on higher Minecraft versions.
body:
# Light Emitting Triode

###### ...And God Said, Let There Be Light.

**Light Emitting Triode `LET`** is a Minecraft mod that provides you plenty of **redstone-controllable,** **decorative** **lamps** and **light sources.** It is also a reimplementation of the mod **[Light Emitting Diode `LED`](https://modrinth.com/mod/led)** (which is awesome!) on higher Minecraft versions.
